mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT recent_views.news_id) AS recentRead, COUNT(DISTINCT subscriptions.reporter_id) AS subscribed, COUNT(DISTINCT bookmarks.news_id) AS bookmarked, COUNT(DISTINCT posts.tugo_id) AS tugo, COUNT(DISTINCT likes.news_id) AS ddabong, COUNT(DISTINCT comments.comment_id) AS commneted FROM tbl_user u LEFT JOIN tbl_views_news recent_views ON u.user_id = recent_views.user_id LEFT JOIN tbl_subscription subscriptions ON u.user_id = subscriptions.user_id LEFT JOIN tbl_bookmark bookmarks ON u.user_id = bookmarks.user_id LEFT JOIN tbl_tugo posts ON u.user_id = posts.user_id LEFT JOIN tbl_ddabong likes ON u.user_id = likes.user_id LEFT JOIN tbl_comment comments ON u.user_id = comments.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(view_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tbl_views_news WHERE user_id = 'asdf@asdf.com' AND view_dt >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) -- 최근 7일 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(view_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY day ASC;
SELECT user_id, nickname, point FROM tbl_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT v.news_id, n.title, n.sub_title AS content, n.view_count, v.view_dt AS date, f.file_url AS image FROM tbl_views_news v JOIN tbl_news n ON v.news_id = n.news_id LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = '100' WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY v.view_dt DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_views_news WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT v.news_id, n.title, n.sub_title AS content, n.view_count, v.bookmark_date AS date, f.file_url AS image FROM tbl_bookmark v JOIN tbl_news n ON v.news_id = n.news_id LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = '100' WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY v.bookmark_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_bookmark WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT v.news_id, n.title, n.sub_title AS content, n.view_count, v.ddabong_date AS date, f.file_url AS image FROM tbl_ddabong v JOIN tbl_news n ON v.news_id = n.news_id LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = '100' WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY v.ddabong_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_ddabong WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT tugo_id AS newsId, title, create_dt AS date FROM tbl_tugo WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_dt DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_tugo WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_comment WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_subscription WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT n.news_id, n.title, n.writer, n.credate_dt, f.file_url FROM tbl_news n INNER JOIN tbl_subscription s ON n.user_id = s.reporter_id LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = 100 WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.credate_dt DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_news n INNER JOIN tbl_subscription s ON n.writer = s.reporter_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId}
